name: Checkbox
description: Binary or indeterminate selection control with optional label and description. Supports checked, indeterminate, and disabled states with text on either side.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Indeterminate state (visual only, overrides checked appearance)

props.name: textOrientation
props.description: Position of the text relative to the checkbox

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label when no visible label is rendered

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element

states.rationale: Unchecked box uses overlay tokens for hover/pressed (transparent surface). Checked/indeterminate box uses OKLCH L-shift on the neutral-base fill.

keyboard.Tab: Moves focus to the next focusable element

accessibility.focusManagement: native input focus; external focus ring via box-shadow on :focus-visible

propertyMapping.note: Figma 'unselected'/'selected'/'middle' maps to code checked=false, checked=true, and indeterminate=true respectively.
Figma-only visual state (normal/hover/focus/pressed/disabled). In code, managed by CSS pseudo-classes and the disabled prop.
Boolean toggle in Figma. Maps to checked prop in code.

useWhen: Multiple independent selections in a list
Indeterminate parent checkbox for select-all/some pattern
doNotUseFor: Toggle with immediate effect — use Switcher
Single on/off with visual toggle — use Switcher

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color tokens in tokens.json. Uses L2 semantic and intent tokens directly. Only --dls-radius-component-checkbox exists as an L4 token.

Figma component set (59:6942) shows only the checkbox box without label/description. In code, Checkbox includes label and description text. The full form control with label is composed at the usage level in Figma.
